phase_name: Gantt bug fixes: phantom line + fast-typing duplication

completed_tasks.name: JS SVG height override for parent bar; blur no longer commits __new__ row
Frappe v1.2.2 guard fix + stale focus timer cancellation

remaining_tasks.name: Browser UAT: parent bar shows 4px strip, no phantom line
Browser UAT: rapid Enter entry produces no duplicate tasks

human_actions_pending.action: UAT Bug 1: open project plan with parent task, verify thin charcoal strip (no phantom line)
UAT Bug 2: type single-char task names rapidly with Enter, verify no duplicates

decisions.decision: CSS height:4px removed; JS sets SVG height/y attributes in initGanttDragLink()
decisions.rationale: CSS height on SVG rect unreliable across browsers

decisions.decision: Removed handleNewRowCommit from blur handler for __new__ — Enter-only commit
decisions.rationale: Blur fired spuriously on onSnapshot re-renders, causing duplicate tasks

next_action: Browser UAT both bugs. If either still fails, run /gsd-debug with full symptom description.
context_notes: Both root causes were deeper than 3 prior fix attempts. Phantom line = CSS vs SVG presentation attribute issue. Duplication = blur on __new__ row firing on wrong events.
